name: jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.rac-main-output-adapter
description: Main-output-side adapter that bridges character-selection-tab IPC contracts to the RealtimeAvatarController (RAC) SlotManager. Subscribes slot/{id}/assignment/settings/command and avatars/{key}/schema topics through the output-renderer-shell IOutputCommandDispatcher, drives RAC SlotManager to add/remove avatars, and publishes slots/catalog, avatars/catalog, slot/{id}/status, slot/{id}/error back to the UI side. The adapter owns RAC runtime lifetime under IOutputSceneRoots.Characters; it does not implement UI tabs, IPC transport, or render shell internals.
